title: LEGO NINJAGO Lloyd's Titan Mech 15th Anniversary - Ninja Action Toy w/a Collectible Minifigure, Shield & Sword - Nostalgic Gift for 14+ Year Old Boys & Adult Fans - 71860
features: A LEGO NINJAGO TITAN – Lloyd’s Titan Mech 15th Anniversary building set for 14+ year old boys and girls to celebrate 15 years of the LEGO NINJAGO TV show
POSABLE ACTION FIGURE – An updated model of Lloyd’s Titan Mech (70676), this ninja toy features several posable body parts including wings, legs, feet, arms and shoulders
SWORD AND SHIELD ACCESSORIES – The mech toy is armed with a sword and, for the first time ever, a large brick-built shield that can also be repurposed and placed on the back as a pair of wings
3 LEGO NINJAGO MINIFIGURES – Model building kit comes with Lloyd and Grimfax from the TV show, plus, a collectible Elemental Master of Ice on a stand with a celebration coin
GIFT FOR TEENAGERS – This play-and-display building set makes a great birthday gift for 14+ year old teenage boys, girls and nostalgic NINJAGO fans
DIGITAL GUIDE – Let the LEGO Builder app guide kids on an intuitive adventure, where they can save sets, track progress and zoom in and rotate models in 3D
A UNIVERSE OF LEGO NINJAGO SETS – This extensive collection lets children escape into an immersive fantasy world for imaginative play with their ninja heroes
description: From the manufacturer Build, play and display LEGO NINJAGO 15th anniversary mech toy Ninja fans can recreate action from the exciting history of the LEGO NINJAGO TV show with this mech toy and 3 minifigures. Boost your collection Lloyd’s Titan Mech Celebrate the 15th anniversary of the LEGO NINJAGO TV show with this impressive updated mech figure packed with posable features and cool weapon accessories. Previous page Highly posable mech toy Mech features several posable body parts, including wings, legs, feet, arms and shoulders for great battle role play. Mech cockpit Lloyd can ride into battles inside the cockpit in the mech’s chest. Sword and shield accessories Mech toy is armed with a sword and, for the first time ever, a large brick-built shield that can be repurposed and placed on the back as a pair of wings. Elemental Master of Ice Collectable elemental master minifigure on a stand with a celebration coin. Lloyd and Grimfax Model building kit with characters from the TV show: Lloyd and Grimfax, both armed with weapon accessories to play out action. Next page The video showcases the product in use. You can save sets, track progress and zoom in and rotate models in 3D as you build. 15th anniversary playset A great gift for nostalgic NINJAGO fans This LEGO NINJAGO 15th anniversary model is an impressive gift for teens and passionate adult fans who can proudly display it in any room.
